Aniya Mehmet
description: Today we had Agus as our tour guide he came on time and picked us up with the most happiest face we have ever seen very clean car and amazing service he explained everything alongside the attractions we went to as we visited two temples and rice terrace what a wonderful day we had we recommend Agus

title: Hari Haran
description: We planned a literally "last minute" trip to Bali without deciding on the itinerary. I was in touch with Bim only to ensure our pickup from the airport. We left the itinerary planning to Bim and it was the best decision ever. It was a proper balance of visiting the important spots, indulging in adve

title: Ron Reyes
description: I had an amazing experience with Agung as my tour guide in Bali. He took me on a sunrise boat tour to see dolphins, visited a temple, and explored stunning waterfalls. Agung's excellent English, driving, and photography skills made the tour truly memorable. I highly recommend booking him for an imme

title: Becka Castro
description: One of the highlights of our trip was having a very professional, friendly and helpful tour guide! Bim took us to all the best spots in Ubud and Nusa Peninda at an affordable price. He also gave us some helpful info and tips so that we can make the most of our trip. I really highly recommend them W.

title: Lars Jönsson
description: I can highly recommend Putu and Private Bali Tours If you want a Private guide on Bali. We had two full day trips with guide/driver Ady and everything went smooth and perfect.

title: Paulina Sanchez
description: 1000% recommend Bim as your tour and driver in Bali. My mom and I had such a great time for a catered and customized full day of exploring Bali - we hired Bim for 3 days! We had such a great time and can't wait to return to Bali! Extra bonus points that Bim picked us up from Uluwatu and gave us a co

title: Serena
description: Did a customised private tour with Putu for most of our days in Bali and our 1st day was spent with Bim. Both were on time for our daily trips and very friendly. They gave advice and even helped us to take many nice looking photos. They are, I would say, the most reasonably priced tours around. Putu

title: Rio Mae Talisic
description: Always the best experience with Private Bali Tours! You can customized your itinerary to your liking. Bim has been a great tour guide as well! Learned a lot about Balinese Culture. ???????? Would recommend Private Bali Tours to family and friends!

title: Maverick Comparan
description: Putu Bimantara was a fantastic tour guide! He did a great job of making sure our tour was both fun and safe, and also answered any questions we had about Indonesian culture. If we ever needed a recommendation about where to go or wanted to learn about something we found interesting, we could always

title: Ron Christian Crisostomo
description: Bim is a local of the place so he knows Bali by heart. He is a very good guide. When my wife and I went to Bali for our honeymoon, Bim gave important facts of the tourist spots we visited. He was very polite, kind, and funny at the same time. We definitely recommend him and this tour!
